donate_lede: Ticket sales and tuition fees cover much of what we do. The rest comes from our wonderful donors - like you!

discovery_cards.title: Main Stage Productions
discovery_cards.body: Full-scale productions, performed by youth ages 6–18 at Mountain View's premier venue.

discovery_cards.eyebrow: For young performers, schools, families & readers
discovery_cards.title: Stories on Stage
discovery_cards.body: Beloved children's books brought to life in short, lively performances designed for young audiences and school groups.

discovery_cards.title: Classes & Summer Camps
discovery_cards.body: From after-school drama and musical theatre, to summer camps, our programs build skills, confidence, and friendships.

discovery_cards.title: Costume & Prop Rentals
discovery_cards.body: Decades of theatrical inventory available to schools and community theatre at affordable rates.

discovery_cards.title: Studio Intensives
discovery_cards.body: Focused, multi-week deep dives in voice, movement, scene study, and audition technique for committed teen performers.

hero_lede: PYT is the Bay Area's home for community youth theatre. From first auditions to opening nights, we believe in the magic that happens when a young person steps on stage.
